query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A close-up of a person's face with one eye partially visible beneath dark hair, illuminated by red light across the forehead and cheekbone while the surrounding areas are consumed by shadow. The subject appears to be looking downward, with minimal background visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up of a person's face deliberately underexposed so that most features dissolve into crushed shadows with absent detail and ambiguous texture, with only one eye partially visible beneath dark hair. Intense red light casts an unhealthy, sickly tint across the visible skin, while the overwhelming darkness and oppressive tonal choices evoke an atmosphere of dread and unease.
